executives.name: Trey Wasser
executives.background: Mr. Wasser has over 40 years of experience in the financial services and mining industries. He is currently the CEO of Dryden Gold Corp. and was previously the President and CEO of Ely Gold Royalties Inc. until its acquisition by Gold Royalty Corp. in 2021. He has extensive experience in capital markets and corporate development.

executives.name: Maura Kolb
executives.background: Ms. Kolb is a professional geologist with over 15 years of experience in the mining industry. She previously served as the Director of Exploration for Treasury Metals and held various roles at Newmont's Musselwhite Mine. She holds a Master of Science in Geology.

executives.name: Ashley Kirwan
executives.background: Ms. Kirwan is a professional geologist with over 15 years of experience. She is the co-founder, President, and CEO of Orix Geoscience Inc. She has worked with numerous exploration and mining companies globally.

executives.name: Anais Sasseville
executives.background: Ms. Sasseville has over 10 years of experience in corporate communications and investor relations within the mining sector. She previously worked with Ely Gold Royalties and Gold Royalty Corp.

executives.name: Steve Polakow
executives.background: Mr. Polakow has over 35 years of experience in financial management and corporate governance. He has served as CFO for several public and private companies in the resource sector.

board_of_directors.name: Trey Wasser
board_of_directors.background: CEO of Dryden Gold Corp. and former CEO of Ely Gold Royalties Inc.

board_of_directors.name: Ashley Kirwan
board_of_directors.background: Co-founder and CEO of Orix Geoscience Inc.

board_of_directors.name: Benoit Lafrance
board_of_directors.background: Dr. Lafrance is a geologist with over 25 years of experience in mineral exploration and academia. He is currently a Professor at Laurentian University and has served on the boards of several exploration companies.

board_of_directors.name: Rob Carpenter
board_of_directors.background: Dr. Carpenter is a professional geologist with over 30 years of experience. He was the co-founder and President/CEO of Kaminak Gold Corp., which was acquired by Goldcorp for $520 million.

board_of_directors.name: Darwin Green
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Green is the President and CEO of HighGold Mining Inc. He has over 25 years of experience in the mining industry, specializing in exploration and project development.

sources.source_description: Dryden Gold Corp. Official Website - Management and Directors Page
